info.name: Facebook Scraper API
info.description: Unlock Facebook data effortlessly with our powerful scraping tools. Extract page names, URLs, contact info, likes, followers, posts, comments, Marketplace listings, and meta ads metrics. Perfect for market research, trend analysis, and optimizing marketing strategies.

request.description: Get the unique ID of any Facebook Page

query.description: (Optional) Facebook profile ID. Used only if link is not provided.
(Optional) Retrieve exact follower count (costs 5 credits). Works only with public pages.
(Optional) Page section to scrape: default (main page) or about (About section)

request.description: Extract essential data from Facebook pages including Ad Page ID, Address, Bio, Business Hours, Category, Email, Followers, Likes, Phone, Rating, and more.

query.description: (Optional) Comma-separated keys to filter the response. Supports dot notation.

request.description: Get the latest Facebook Page posts (up to 3 posts per request). Use end_cursor to retrieve more posts.

query.description: (Optional) Facebook profile ID. Used only if link is not provided.

request.description: Get the Facebook Page Videos (up to 6 videos per request). Use end_cursor to retrieve more videos.

query.description: (Optional) Facebook profile ID. Used only if link is not provided.

request.description: Get the latest Facebook Page Reels (up to 10 reels per request). Use end_cursor to retrieve more reels.
Get the unique ID of any Facebook Group
Get group metadata details (name, id, url, image).
Extract key data from Facebook groups including Total Members, New Members, Creation Date, Description, Group ID, Rules, Member Activity, and more.
Get the latest Facebook Groups posts (up to 3 posts per request). Use end_cursor to retrieve more posts.
Get the Facebook Group Videos (up to 6 videos per request). Use end_cursor to retrieve more videos.
Extract the post ID from the Facebook URL
Retrieves details of a Facebook post based on the provided link.

query.description: (Optional) Facebook Post ID. Used only if link is not provided.
(Optional) When true, includes comment_feedback_id and expansion_token for fetching replies.

request.description: Get the details of comments on Facebook posts (up to 10 comments per post). Use end_cursor to retrieve additional comments.

query.description: (Required) Feedback ID of the parent comment.

request.description: Fetches replies to a specific comment. Requires comment_feedback_id and expansion_token from the comments endpoint with include_reply_info=true.

query.description: (Optional) Facebook Post ID. Costs 5 credits. Works only with public pages.

request.description: Retrieves details about attachments (images, videos, links) and all reactions associated with a Facebook post.
Retrieves details of a Facebook video post including title, description, duration, view count, and more.
Retrieves information about Facebook pages based on a search query and optional location.
Retrieves information about Facebook People based on a search query and optional location.
Retrieves information about Facebook locations based on a search query.
Retrieves information about Facebook Posts based on a search query with optional location and time filters.

query.description: (Optional) Comma-separated list of keys to include. Supports dot notation.

request.description: Retrieves Facebook Videos based on a search query. Use end_cursor for pagination.
Retrieves a list of all available country codes for filtering ads by country.

query.description: (Optional) Facebook AD Page ID. Used only if query is not provided.
(Optional) Sort: impressions (high to low) or recent (most recent)

request.description: Retrieves ad pages based on a search query, returning up to 26 ads per request.
Same as GET but uses POST body to avoid 414 URI Too Long errors with long pagination cursors.
Retrieves detailed information about a specific Facebook page based on page ID.
Retrieve detailed information about a specific archived ad based on its archive ID.
Search for ads based on a keyword. Filter by country, status, and ad type.

query.description: (Optional) Item condition. Comma-separated: new, used_like_new, used_good, used_fair
(Optional) If true, limits to items posted today

request.description: Retrieves Facebook Marketplace items with filters for Location, Price, Date, Radius, Category, Sort Order, and more.
Fetches detailed listing info: URL, photo, price, location, status, seller, delivery, title, comparable pricing.
Retrieve seller profile, ratings, reviews, and badges.
Retrieves marketplace category details with seo_url and category id values.
Retrieve city coordinates (name, latitude, longitude) for use as location filters.
Fetch vehicle listings with filters for location, price, sorting, mileage, year, and more.

item.name: Get Marketplace Rental Property Search Results

request.description: Fetch rental property listings with filters for location, price, bedrooms, bathrooms, and more.
Download media (images, videos, audio) from Facebook URLs.
